step_description: Active session and wait class snapshot
narrative_hint: Three active sessions all showing db file sequential read waits with the same or similar sql_ids. No lock contention or enqueue waits. This strongly points to a single SQL statement performing excessive physical I/O — likely a full table scan or inadequate index. Claude should identify User I/O as the dominant wait class and recommend running hot_sql_by_elapsed to identify the specific SQL.
